headline: Seven times off pace: earn your deficit today
summary: You're losing 0.08 kg/week when 0.65 is required; today's discipline bridges the 0.57 kg weekly gap.
details: Replace emotional snacking with portioned Huel meals today—structure removes choice and keeps you under target kJ. Row for 45 minutes minimum to build deficit momentum; no shortcuts. Thursday determines Friday's momentum; you're entering your weakest period with zero buffer for weekend slip-ups.
